question: What happens if you land on an unowned property and choose not to buy it?
expected_answer: The Banker sells it at auction to the highest bidder. Any player, including the one who declined, may bid. Bidding may start at any price.
model_answer: According to the rules, if you land on an unowned property and choose not to buy it, you must put the property up for auction. This is stated in the section regarding the Speed Die rules, specifically when using Mr. Monopoly: "If you don't want to buy this property, move to the space anyway and put the property up for auction."
